clusters.justification: These terms reliably co-activate across anterior insular, anterior cingulate, and amygdalar circuitry, underlying the macroscopic processing of generalized valence, arousal, and emotional reactivity.

Mapped fundamentally onto ventral frontostriatal and dopaminergic circuitry, this functional axis represents the macro-level computation of utility, reinforcement, and goal-directed action formulation.

Engaging the cortical midline and temporoparietal subsystems, these terms coalesce around the high-level capacity to construct internal representations regarding one's own identity, experiences, and the intentions of other agents.
